name: Layered Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 Ounces Frozen Peas, cook, drain & cool
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the lettuce, onion, celery, pepper, and peas in a bowl.
2. Cover with a layer of mayonnaise, sealing the edges.
3. Sprinkle with sugar, grated cheese, and crumbled bacon.
4. Cover tightly and refrigerate for up to 24 hours.
5. Toss before serving.
Serves: 8
Source: "Mountain Measures" of the Junior League of Charleston, WV. ed. 1974
